subject: Re: Re-process a single item's CTF
body:
Hi Cyan,

If you did this once the processing was finished then don’t worry, you still have all of your results and appropriate metadata for the ‘outdated’ results in the xml files. The fact that entries are outdated shouldn’t stop you from moving forward with your processing 🙂

I don’t think there’s a way to change settings for a subset of images from the GUI.

Cheers,

Alister

> On 10 Dec 2021, at 09:39, Cyan Ching <xingyichengcyanching@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> ﻿
> Dear all,
> 
> Good morning! 
> 
> During mass frame series pre-processing in Warp, is there a way to keep processing status of tilts following re-processing? All processed tilts just became outdated following the re-processing of a single item's CTF. 
> 
> Thank you for your help!
> 
> Best,
> 
> Cyan
> 
> PhD student at Physical Chemistry Curie Lab
> --
